heading: Measurement
label: 14502 Measurement
text: The Secretary shall measure a vessel to which this chapter applies in the way provided by this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised section 14502Source: Section (U.S. Code) 46 App. U.S.C. 71, 77, 83.Section 14502 requires the Secretary to measure a vessel to which this chapter applies as provided by this chapter.
